title: 'Deliberate Disinformation Attempt To Provoke Tensions': PIB Fact Checks Indian Army Truck Attack Claim by Pak Propaganda Accounts
description: The Press Information Bureau's Fact Check Unit has strongly refuted a false narrative being spread by Pakistani propaganda accounts on social media about Indian Army trucks set on fire, resulting in the deaths of 22 Indian Army personnel. No such incident has occurred, the PIB Fact Check confirmed.
